subject: fix(ui): scope Escape handler to dialog element, fix ReactNode null check
body:
- ConfirmDialog: move keydown listener from window to the dialog container
  element so only the focused dialog responds to Escape. Prevents stacked
  dialogs from all closing simultaneously. Works because useFocusTrap keeps
  focus inside the dialog, so Escape events bubble to the container naturally.
- AppHeader: change `actions &&` to `actions != null` to correctly handle
  falsy-but-valid ReactNode values (0, "").

Tags: accessibility, bug-fix, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ui-polish
Semver: patch
